title: Romantic Rustic Syrian Porcini Pilaf
description: A fragrant, fluffy pilaf infused with dried porcini, aromatic spices and olive oil, served from a traditional kadhai for an intimate Syrian dinner.
instructions: Soak the dried porcini mushrooms in warm water for 20 minutes, then drain and chop finely.
Heat the olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat, add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin and coriander and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped porcini and continue to sauté for 2 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Rinse the basmati rice under cold water until the water runs clear, then add it to the kadhai and stir to coat with oil and spices.
Pour in the vegetable broth, season with salt and pepper, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 15 minutes until the rice is fluffy and liquid absorbed.
Remove from heat, fluff the pilaf with a fork, and sprinkle chopped parsley on top for a fresh finish.
Serve immediately from the kadhai to create a rustic, romantic presentation.
